series_metadata.series_description: Files contain fiscal documents related to annual expenditures for personnel and benefits, goods and services (includes personal service contracts, training, and temporary staffing, and maintenance, supplies, equipment, travel, telecommunication costs). Records detail budget narratives, expenditure justifications, and cost analysis illustrating appropriation allocations. Files include executive budget proposals, internal budget plans and projections, bid proposals, purchasing and reconciliation documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office
